trans-unit.id: Forces all app traffic on the device into the VPN tunnel, ensuring that other apps can’t accidentally or maliciously leak data. Apple system apps and services necessary for device functionality are not affected.

trans-unit.id: If you are not connected to our VPN, then the Encrypted DNS proxy will use your own non-VPN IP when connecting. The DoH servers are hosted by one of the following providers: Quad9 or Cloudflare.
trans-unit.source: If you are not connected to our VPN, then the Encrypted DNS proxy will use your own non-VPN IP when connecting. The DoH servers are hosted by one of the following providers: Quad9 or Cloudflare.

trans-unit.id: If you disconnect now, you won’t be able to secure your connection until the device is online.

trans-unit.id: Internal error occurred. Settings will be reset to defaults and device logged out.

trans-unit.id: It does this by allowing network communication outside the tunnel to local multicast and broadcast ranges as well as to and from these private IP ranges:
trans-unit.source: It does this by allowing network communication outside the tunnel to local multicast and broadcast ranges as well as to and from these private IP ranges:
trans-unit.target: Den gjør det ved å tillate nettverkkommunikasjon utenfor tunnelen til lokale multicast- og sendingsintervall, samt mellom følgende privat IP-intervall:
trans-unit.note: Additional information about how the local network sharing feature works.

trans-unit.id: It does this by performing an extra key exchange using a quantum safe algorithm and mixing the result into WireGuard’s regular encryption. This extra step uses approximately 500 kiB of traffic every time a new tunnel is established.
trans-unit.source: It does this by performing an extra key exchange using a quantum safe algorithm and mixing the result into WireGuard’s regular encryption. This extra step uses approximately 500 kiB of traffic every time a new tunnel is established.
trans-unit.target: Det gjøres ved at å utføre en ekstra nøkkelutveksling med en kvantesikker algoritme og kombinere resultatet med WireGuard sin vanlige kryptering. Dette ekstratrinnet bruker omtrent 500 kiB trafikk hver gang det opprettes en ny tunnel.

trans-unit.id: It looks like you’ve entered an account number instead of a voucher code. If you would like to change the active account, please log out first.
trans-unit.source: It looks like you’ve entered an account number instead of a voucher code. If you would like to change the active account, please log out first.
trans-unit.target: Det ser ut til at du har oppgitt et kontonummer i stedet for en kupongkode. Hvis du vil endre den aktive kontoen, må du først logge ut.

trans-unit.note: Header text for a view that presents information about known issues with Mullvad VPN.

trans-unit.id: Last four digits of the account number are incorrect
trans-unit.source: Last four digits of the account number are incorrect
trans-unit.target: De fire siste sifrene i kontonummeret er feil

trans-unit.note: The name of the feature that will be disabled when "Disabling Local Network Sharing" is selected.

trans-unit.id: Locations can be selected directly or expanded. When a city or country is selected, all compatible servers in that location will be candidates for any given tunnel connection.
trans-unit.source: Locations can be selected directly or expanded. When a city or country is selected, all compatible servers in that location will be candidates for any given tunnel connection.
trans-unit.target: Plasseringer kan velges direkte eller utvides. Når en by eller et land velges, vil alle kompatible servere på den plasseringen være kandidater for en gitt tunnelforbindelse.
trans-unit.note: A description below the list of available locations, explaining how users can interact with them.

trans-unit.id: Manage and add custom methods to access the Mullvad API.
trans-unit.source: Manage and add custom methods to access the Mullvad API.
trans-unit.target: Administrer og legg til tilpassede metoder for tilgang til Mullvad API.

trans-unit.note: Title of a view controller that allows the user to configure the settings of a specific access method.
Title of a settings item that indicates that the user has migrated settings from an older version of the app.
Title of a section in the settings view related to the mode of the multihop tunnel.

trans-unit.target: Innstillingen for multihopp er satt til «Automatisk»
trans-unit.note: Description of a settings update when the multihop entry setting is set to "Automatic".

trans-unit.id: Multihop is being used to enable DAITA for your selected location.
trans-unit.source: Multihop is being used to enable DAITA for your selected location.
trans-unit.target: Multihop brukes til å aktivere DAITA for den valgte plasseringen.

trans-unit.id: Multihop is disabled. Your selected location must support all active settings in order to establish a connection.
trans-unit.source: Multihop is disabled. Your selected location must support all active settings in order to establish a connection.
trans-unit.target: Multihopp er deaktivert. Den valgte plasseringen må støtte alle aktive innstillinger for at det skal være mulig å opprette en tilkobling.

trans-unit.id: Multihop is enabled. Your connection is routed through an entry server before exiting through the selected location.
trans-unit.source: Multihop is enabled. Your connection is routed through an entry server before exiting through the selected location.
trans-unit.target: Multihopp er aktivert. Tilkoblingen din dirigeres via en inngangsserver før den går ut via den valgte plasseringen.
trans-unit.note: Text displayed in the settings view when multihop is enabled.

trans-unit.id: Multihop is now split into three modes: When needed, Always, and Never. This gives you more flexibility with your connection preferences.
trans-unit.source: Multihop is now split into three modes: When needed, Always, and Never. This gives you more flexibility with your connection preferences.
trans-unit.target: Multihopp er nå delt inn i tre moduser: «Når nødvendig», «Alltid» og «Aldri». Dette gir deg større fleksibilitet når det gjelder tilkoblingsinnstillingene.
trans-unit.note: Description of the change that was made to the multihop setting.
Message displayed in the action sheet when changing the VPN connection mode to "When needed".

trans-unit.id: Multihop routes your traffic into one WireGuard server and out another, making it harder to trace. This results in increased latency but increases anonymity online.
trans-unit.source: Multihop routes your traffic into one WireGuard server and out another, making it harder to trace. This results in increased latency but increases anonymity online.
trans-unit.target: Multihopp dirigerer trafikken din inn på én WireGuard-server og ut på en annen, noe som gjør det vanskeligere å spore den. Dette resulterer i økt ventetid, men øker anonymiteten på nettet.

trans-unit.id: Multihop routes your traffic into one WireGuard server and out another, making it harder to trace. This results in increased latency but increases anonymity online. Multihop has three different modes to choose between: When needed, Always, and Never.
trans-unit.source: Multihop routes your traffic into one WireGuard server and out another, making it harder to trace. This results in increased latency but increases anonymity online. Multihop has three different modes to choose between: When needed, Always, and Never.
trans-unit.target: Multihopp dirigerer trafikken din inn på én WireGuard-server og ut på en annen, noe som gjør det vanskeligere å spore den. Dette resulterer i økt ventetid, men øker anonymiteten på nettet. Multihopp har tre moduser å velge mellom: «Når nødvendig», «Alltid» og «Aldri».
trans-unit.note: Description of the Multihop feature, including its benefits and modes of operation.

trans-unit.id: Name should be no longer than %i characters
trans-unit.source: Name should be no longer than %i characters
trans-unit.target: Navnet kan ikke være lenger enn %i tegn

trans-unit.id: Name should be no longer than %i characters.

Button title when there are no matching relays to show.

trans-unit.id: No result for "%@", please try a different search term.

trans-unit.id: Not all our locations/servers support every feature in the app. If your selected location/server doesn’t support the features you’ve enabled, the app will automatically multihop via a compatible server.
trans-unit.source: Not all our locations/servers support every feature in the app. If your selected location/server doesn’t support the features you’ve enabled, the app will automatically multihop via a compatible server.
trans-unit.target: Not all our locations/servers support every feature in the app. If your selected location/server doesn’t support the features you’ve enabled, the app will automatically multihop via a compatible server.
trans-unit.note: A sentence that describes the feature

trans-unit.id: Not all our servers are %@-enabled. Therefore, we use multihop automatically to enable %@ with any server.
trans-unit.source: Not all our servers are %1$@-enabled. Therefore, we use multihop automatically to enable %2$@ with any server.
trans-unit.target: Ikke alle serverne våre er %1$@-aktiverte. Derfor bruker vi automatisk multihopp for å aktivere %2$@ med alle servere.

trans-unit.note: Title of the screen where a user can configure their notification settings.

trans-unit.id: Notifications for Mullvad VPN are disabled on this device. Please change your system settings for Mullvad VPN if you wish to enable them again.
trans-unit.source: Notifications for Mullvad VPN are disabled on this device. Please change your system settings for Mullvad VPN if you wish to enable them again.
trans-unit.target: Varsler for Mullvad VPN er deaktivert på denne enheten. Endre systeminnstillingene for Mullvad VPN hvis du ønsker å aktivere dem igjen.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed to users who have disabled notifications for Mullvad VPN on their device. It instructs them to open their system settings to re-enable notifications.

trans-unit.id: Notifications for Mullvad VPN are disabled on this device. Please change your system settings for Mullvad VPN if you wish to enable them again. These settings can be changed at any time.
trans-unit.source: Notifications for Mullvad VPN are disabled on this device. Please change your system settings for Mullvad VPN if you wish to enable them again. These settings can be changed at any time.
trans-unit.target: Varsler for Mullvad VPN er deaktivert på denne enheten. Endre systeminnstillingene for Mullvad VPN hvis du ønsker å aktivere dem igjen. Disse innstillingene kan endres når som helst.
trans-unit.note: Text displayed in a notification prompt view model when notifications are disabled on the device.

trans-unit.id: Obfuscation hides the WireGuard traffic inside another protocol. It can be used to help circumvent censorship and other types of filtering, where a plain WireGuard connection would be blocked.
trans-unit.source: Obfuscation hides the WireGuard traffic inside another protocol. It can be used to help circumvent censorship and other types of filtering, where a plain WireGuard connection would be blocked.
trans-unit.target: Tilsløring skjuler WireGuard-trafikken i en annen protokoll. Man kan på den måten omgå sensur og andre typer filter der en vanlig WireGuard-tilkobling ville blitt blokkert.

trans-unit.id: On some networks, where various types of censorship are being used, our server IP addresses are sometimes blocked.
trans-unit.source: On some networks, where various types of censorship are being used, our server IP addresses are sometimes blocked.
trans-unit.target: På enkelte nettverk der det brukes ulike typer sensur, kan server-IP-adressene av og til være blokkerte.

trans-unit.id: On some networks, where various types of censorship are being used, the API servers might not be directly reachable.
trans-unit.source: On some networks, where various types of censorship are being used, the API servers might not be directly reachable.
trans-unit.target: På enkelte nettverk der det brukes ulike typer sensur, kan det hende API-servere ikke er direkte tilgjengelig.

trans-unit.note: Text for a button that opens the user's system settings.

trans-unit.source: Tap to view API access methods
trans-unit.note: Action title for the in-app notification that informs the user to tap to view API access methods.

trans-unit.id: The DAITA sub-setting “Direct only” has been removed and simplified to avoid blocking connections. Instead, with DAITA enabled, you make this option with the multihop setting.
trans-unit.source: The DAITA sub-setting “Direct only” has been removed and simplified to avoid blocking connections. Instead, with DAITA enabled, you make this option with the multihop setting.
trans-unit.target: DAITA-underinnstillingen «Kun direkte» er fjernet og forenklet for å unngå at tilkoblinger blokkeres. Når DAITA er aktivert, velger du i stedet dette alternativet via multihopp-innstillingen.

trans-unit.id: The app communicates with a Mullvad API server directly.
trans-unit.source: The app communicates with a Mullvad API server directly.
trans-unit.target: Appen kommuniserer direkte med en Mullvad API-server.

trans-unit.id: The app communicates with a Mullvad API server via a Mullvad bridge server.
trans-unit.source: The app communicates with a Mullvad API server via a Mullvad bridge server.
trans-unit.target: Appen kommuniserer med en Mullvad API-server via en Mullvad-broserver.

trans-unit.id: The app communicates with a Mullvad API server via a proxy address.
trans-unit.source: The app communicates with a Mullvad API server via a proxy address.
trans-unit.target: Appen kommuniserer direkte med en Mullvad API-server via en proxy-adresse.

trans-unit.id: The app needs to communicate with a Mullvad API server to log you in, fetch server lists, and other critical operations.
trans-unit.source: The app needs to communicate with a Mullvad API server to log you in, fetch server lists, and other critical operations.
trans-unit.target: Appen må kunne kommunisere med en Mullvad API-server for å logge deg inn, hente serverlister og utføre andre kritiske operasjoner.

trans-unit.id: The app will test the method before saving.
trans-unit.source: The app will test the method before saving.
trans-unit.target: Appen vil teste metoden før den lagres.

trans-unit.id: The automatic setting will randomly choose from the valid port ranges shown below.
trans-unit.source: The automatic setting will randomly choose from the valid port ranges shown below.
trans-unit.target: Den automatiske innstillingen vil tilfeldig velge fra utvalget av gyldige porter vist under.

trans-unit.id: The custom port can be any value inside the valid ranges: %@.
trans-unit.source: The custom port can be any value inside the valid ranges: %@.
trans-unit.target: Den egendefinerte porten kan ha en hvilken som helst verdi innen det gyldige utvalget: %@.

trans-unit.id: The device will be removed from the list and logged out.
trans-unit.source: The device will be removed from the list and logged out.
trans-unit.target: Enheten blir fjernet fra listen og logget ut.

trans-unit.id: The entry and exit servers cannot be the same. Try changing one to a new server or location.
trans-unit.source: The entry and exit servers cannot be the same. Try changing one to a new server or location.
trans-unit.target: Inngangs- og utgangsserverne kan ikke være de samme. Prøv å endre en av dem til en ny server eller plassering.

trans-unit.id: The entry server is currently selected automatically to ensure your current settings work with your selected location.
trans-unit.source: The entry server is currently selected automatically to ensure your current settings work with your selected location.
trans-unit.target: Inngangsserveren velges for øyeblikket automatisk for å sikre at dine nåværende innstillinger fungerer med den valgte plasseringen.
trans-unit.note: Description of the feature that automatically selects an entry server based on the user's location.

trans-unit.id: The multihop mode “Always” now features an “Automatic” location for the entry server selection.
trans-unit.source: The multihop mode “Always” now features an “Automatic” location for the entry server selection.
trans-unit.target: Multihopp-modusen «Alltid» har nå et «Automatisk»-valg for plassering av inngangsserver.

trans-unit.id: The selected WireGuard port is not supported, please change it under **VPN settings**.
trans-unit.source: The selected WireGuard port is not supported, please change it under **VPN settings**.
trans-unit.target: Valgt WireGuard-port støttes ikke. Du kan endre den i **VPN-innstillingene**.

trans-unit.id: The selected obfuscation port is not supported, please change it under **VPN settings**.
trans-unit.source: The selected obfuscation port is not supported, please change it under **VPN settings**.
trans-unit.target: Valgt tilsløringsport støttes ikke. Du kan endre den i **VPN-innstillingene**.
trans-unit.note: Description of an in-app notification that appears when the selected obfuscation port is not supported.

trans-unit.id: The version of settings stored on device is unrecognized.Settings will be reset to defaults and the device will be logged out.
trans-unit.source: The version of settings stored on device is unrecognized.Settings will be reset to defaults and the device will be logged out.
trans-unit.target: Innstillingene som er lagret på enheten, gjenkjennes ikke. Innstillingene vil bli tilbakestilt til standardinnstillingene, og enheten vil bli logget ut.

trans-unit.id: These settings can be changed at any time
trans-unit.source: These settings can be changed at any time
trans-unit.target: Disse innstillingene kan endres når som helst
trans-unit.note: Text displayed in a notification when a user enables notifications for the first time.

trans-unit.id: This can be useful if the API is censored but Mullvad’s bridge servers are not.
trans-unit.source: This can be useful if the API is censored but Mullvad’s bridge servers are not.
trans-unit.target: Dette kan være nyttig hvis API er sensurert, men Mullvads broservere ikke er det.

trans-unit.id: This can be useful when you are not affected by censorship.
trans-unit.source: This can be useful when you are not affected by censorship.
trans-unit.target: Dette kan være nyttig når du ikke er berørt av sensur.

trans-unit.id: This device is now named **%@**. See more under "Manage devices" in Account.
trans-unit.source: This device is now named **%@**. See more under "Manage devices" in Account.
trans-unit.target: Denne enheten heter nå **%@**. Se mer under «Administrer enheter» i kontoen.

trans-unit.id: This ensures your connection does not get blocked due to incompatible settings.
trans-unit.source: This ensures your connection does not get blocked due to incompatible settings.
trans-unit.target: Dette sørger for at tilkoblingen ikke blir blokkert på grunn av inkompatible innstillinger.
trans-unit.note: A description of the when-needed multihop feature.

trans-unit.id: This feature allows access to other devices on the local network, such as for sharing, printing, streaming, etc.
trans-unit.source: This feature allows access to other devices on the local network, such as for sharing, printing, streaming, etc.
trans-unit.target: Funksjonen gir tilgang til andre enheter på det lokale nettverket for ting som deling, utskrift, strømming osv.

trans-unit.id: This feature allows you to circumvent that censorship by adding custom ways to access the API via proxies and similar methods.
trans-unit.source: This feature allows you to circumvent that censorship by adding custom ways to access the API via proxies and similar methods.
trans-unit.target: Denne funksjonen lar deg omgå sensuren ved å legge til tilpassede måter å få tilgang til API på via proxyer og lignende metoder.

trans-unit.id: This feature makes the WireGuard tunnel resistant to potential attacks from quantum computers.
trans-unit.source: This feature makes the WireGuard tunnel resistant to potential attacks from quantum computers.
trans-unit.target: Denne funksjonen gjør WireGuard-tunnelen motstandsdyktig mot potensielle angrep fra kvantemaskiner.

trans-unit.id: This is the name assigned to the device. Each device logged in on a Mullvad account gets a unique name that helps you identify it when you manage your devices in the app or on the website.
trans-unit.source: This is the name assigned to the device. Each device logged in on a Mullvad account gets a unique name that helps you identify it when you manage your devices in the app or on the website.
trans-unit.target: Dette er navnet som er tildelt enheten. Enhver enhet som er logget inn på en Mullvad-konto, får et unikt navn som gjør det enklere for deg å identifisere den når du administrerer enheten i appen eller på nettsiden.

trans-unit.id: This logs out all devices using this account and all VPN access will be denied even if there is time left on the account. Enter the last 4 digits of the account number and hit "Delete account" if you really want to delete the account:
trans-unit.source: This logs out all devices using this account and all VPN access will be denied even if there is time left on the account. Enter the last 4 digits of the account number and hit "Delete account" if you really want to delete the account:
trans-unit.target: Dette logger ut alle enheter som bruker denne kontoen, og all VPN-tilgang vil bli avvist selv om det er tid igjen på kontoen. Skriv inn de fire siste sifrene i kontonummeret og trykk på «Slett konto» hvis du virkelig ønsker å slette kontoen:

trans-unit.id: This might cause issues on certain websites, services, and apps.
trans-unit.source: This might cause issues on certain websites, services, and apps.
trans-unit.target: Dette kan føre til problemer på enkelte nettsteder, tjenester og apper.

trans-unit.id: This mode allows the app to automatically multihop through an additional server if needed to ensure your current settings work with your selected location.
trans-unit.source: This mode allows the app to automatically multihop through an additional server if needed to ensure your current settings work with your selected location.
trans-unit.target: I denne modusen kan appen automatisk kjøre multihopp via en ekstra server ved behov for å sikre at dine nåværende innstillinger fungerer med den valgte plasseringen.

trans-unit.id: This setting controls whether the app connects to VPN servers using IPv4 or IPv6.Automatic setting allows app to choose between both, but currently app will only use IPv4.
trans-unit.source: This setting controls whether the app connects to VPN servers using IPv4 or IPv6.Automatic setting allows app to choose between both, but currently app will only use IPv4.
trans-unit.target: Denne innstillingen bestemmer om appen skal koble seg til VPN-servere ved hjelp av IPv4 eller IPv6. Med den automatiske innstillingen kan appen velge mellom begge, men foreløpig bruker appen kun IPv4.
trans-unit.note: Description of a setting in the VPN settings screen that allows the user to choose between IPv4 and IPv6 connections.

A description of an action that will be taken when a user disables the "Include all networks" feature, including the action that will be taken with the "Local Network Sharing" feature. The argument is the string “Local Network Sharing”.

trans-unit.id: This will be indicated by the %@ symbol
trans-unit.source: This will be indicated by the %@ symbol
trans-unit.target: Dette vil bli angitt med symbolet %@
trans-unit.note: A description of the "When needed" feature, including a

trans-unit.id: This will be indicated by the %@ symbol.
trans-unit.source: This will be indicated by the %@ symbol.
trans-unit.target: Dette vil bli angitt med symbolet %@.
trans-unit.note: A description of what the when-needed symbol means. The symbol is a small, monochrome image that looks like a question mark with a slash through it.

trans-unit.id: This will be indicated by the “Multihop when needed“ symbol
trans-unit.source: This will be indicated by the “Multihop when needed“ symbol
trans-unit.target: Dette vil bli angitt med symbolet «Multihopp når nødvendig»
trans-unit.note: A description of the accessibility label for the multihop when needed icon.

trans-unit.id: To add locations to a list, press the pen or long press on a country, city, or server.
trans-unit.source: To add locations to a list, press the pen or long press on a country, city, or server.
trans-unit.target: Hvis du vil legge til plasseringer i en liste, kan du trykke på pennen eller hold inne på et land, en by eller en server.

trans-unit.id: To add more, you will need to disconnect and access the Internet with an unsecure connection.
trans-unit.source: To add more, you will need to disconnect and access the Internet with an unsecure connection.
trans-unit.target: For å legge til mer, må du koble fra og koble til internettet med en usikker tilkobling.

trans-unit.id: To assist you better, please write in English or Swedish and include which country you are connecting from.
trans-unit.source: To assist you better, please write in English or Swedish and include which country you are connecting from.
trans-unit.target: For at vi skal kunne hjelpe deg bedre, ber vi deg om å skrive på engelsk eller svensk og fortelle hvilket land du befinner deg i.

trans-unit.id: To avoid getting blocked, we recommend that you set your multihop mode to “%@”.
trans-unit.source: To avoid getting blocked, we recommend that you set your multihop mode to “%@”.
trans-unit.target: For å unngå å bli blokkert anbefaler vi at du stiller inn multihopp-modusen til «%@».

trans-unit.id: To avoid having to change the entry server manually, we recommend you set the multihop entry server to “%@”.
trans-unit.source: To avoid having to change the entry server manually, we recommend you set the multihop entry server to “%@”.
trans-unit.target: For å unngå å måtte endre inngangsserveren manuelt anbefaler vi at du angir multihopp-inngangsserveren til «%@».
trans-unit.note: A suggestion to set the multihop entry server to "Automatic". The argument is the string “Automatic”.

trans-unit.id: To circumvent this you can import a file or a text, provided by our support team, with new IP addresses that override the default addresses of the servers in the Select location view.
trans-unit.source: To circumvent this you can import a file or a text, provided by our support team, with new IP addresses that override the default addresses of the servers in the Select location view.
trans-unit.target: For å omgå dette kan du importere en fil eller tekst, som du har fått fra kundestøtteteamet, med nye IP-adresser som overstyrer standardadressene til serverne i «Velg plassering».

trans-unit.id: To continue your journey as a privacy ninja, visit our website to pick up other privacy-friendly habits and tools.
trans-unit.source: To continue your journey as a privacy ninja, visit our website to pick up other privacy-friendly habits and tools.
trans-unit.target: For å fortsette reisen som en personvernninja, besøk nettstedet vårt og plukk opp andre personvernvennlige vaner og verktøy.

trans-unit.id: To create a custom list press the “+” or long press on a country, city, or server.
trans-unit.source: To create a custom list press the “+” or long press on a country, city, or server.
trans-unit.target: Hvis du vil opprette en egendefinert liste, kan du trykke på «+» eller holde inne på et land, en by eller en server.

trans-unit.id: To enable this setting, add at least one server.
trans-unit.source: To enable this setting, add at least one server.
trans-unit.target: For å aktivere denne innstillingen må du legge til minst én server.

trans-unit.id: To help you more effectively, your app’s log file will be attached to this message. Your data will remain secure and private, as it is anonymised before being sent over an encrypted channel.
trans-unit.source: To help you more effectively, your app’s log file will be attached to this message. Your data will remain secure and private, as it is anonymised before being sent over an encrypted channel.
trans-unit.target: For å kunne gi deg god nok hjelp vil loggfilen til appen ligge som vedlegg til meldingen. All data forblir beskyttet og privat gjennom anonymisering før det sendes gjennom en kryptert kanal.

trans-unit.id: To manually select an entry server, please switch multihop mode to “%@”.
trans-unit.source: To manually select an entry server, please switch multihop mode to “%@”.
trans-unit.target: To manually select an entry server, please switch multihop mode to “%@”.
trans-unit.note: A description of the warning that appears when the user is prompted to manually select an entry server. The argument is the description of the multihop mode that will be used instead.

trans-unit.id: To start using the app, you first need to add time to your account.
trans-unit.source: To start using the app, you first need to add time to your account.
trans-unit.target: For å starte bruken av appen, må du først legge til tid til kontoen.

trans-unit.note: Description of a WireGuard obfuscation method when using UDP over TCP.

trans-unit.id: Unable to authenticate account. Please log out and log back in.
trans-unit.source: Unable to authenticate account. Please log out and log back in.
trans-unit.target: Kunne ikke autentisere konto. Logg ut og inn igjen.

trans-unit.id: Unable to start tunnel connection after update. Please disconnect and reconnect.
trans-unit.source: Unable to start tunnel connection after update. Please disconnect and reconnect.
trans-unit.target: Kunne ikke starte tunneltilkobling etter oppdatering. Koble fra og til igjen.

trans-unit.id: Unable to start tunnel connection. Please send a problem report.
trans-unit.source: Unable to start tunnel connection. Please send a problem report.
trans-unit.target: Kunne ikke starte tunneltilkobling. Send inn en problemrapport.

trans-unit.note: Accessibility label for a location cell when it is not selected.
Title of an in-app notification that alerts the user that a new app version is available.
A string describing the valid port ranges for LWO obfuscation. The argument is the string “”.

trans-unit.id: View and manage all your logged in devices. You can have up to 5 devices on one account at a time. Each device gets a name when logged in to help you tell them apart easily.
trans-unit.source: View and manage all your logged in devices. You can have up to 5 devices on one account at a time. Each device gets a name when logged in to help you tell them apart easily.
trans-unit.target: Se og administrer alle innloggede enheter. Du kan ha opptil fem enheter på én konto om gangen. Hver enhet får et navn når du logger inn, slik at du enkelt kan skille dem fra hverandre.

trans-unit.id: Voucher code has already been used.
trans-unit.source: Voucher code has already been used.

trans-unit.id: Warning: The malware blocker is not an anti-virus and should not be treated as such, this is just an extra layer of protection.
trans-unit.source: Warning: The malware blocker is not an anti-virus and should not be treated as such, this is just an extra layer of protection.
trans-unit.target: Advarsel: Blokkeringen av skadelig programvare er ikke et antivirusprogram og skal ikke brukes som dette. Det er bare et ekstra lag med beskyttelse.

trans-unit.id: We are having some issues, please try again later
trans-unit.source: We are having some issues, please try again later
trans-unit.target: Vi opplever problemer. Prøv igjen senere

trans-unit.id: We will never send you any ads or tips.
trans-unit.source: We will never send you any ads or tips.
trans-unit.target: Vi vil aldri sende deg annonser eller tips.
trans-unit.note: Additional information about the privacy policy of Mullvad VPN.

trans-unit.id: When multihop is set to “Always” or “Never” you must manually select a DAITA server.
trans-unit.source: When multihop is set to “Always” or “Never” you must manually select a DAITA server.
trans-unit.target: Når multihopp er satt til «Alltid» eller «Aldri», må du velge en DAITA-server manuelt.
trans-unit.note: Description of a setting update when the multihop mode is set to "Always" or "Never" and a DAITA server must be manually selected.

trans-unit.id: When multihop is set to “When needed” the app might use an additional server to make sure you connect to your selected location using DAITA.
trans-unit.source: When multihop is set to “When needed” the app might use an additional server to make sure you connect to your selected location using DAITA.
trans-unit.target: Når multihopp er satt til «Når nødvendig», kan appen bruke en ekstra server for å sikre at du kobler deg til den valgte plasseringen via DAITA.

trans-unit.id: When selected, the app automatically picks a random server, prioritizing those closer to the exit location for better performance.
trans-unit.source: When selected, the app automatically picks a random server, prioritizing those closer to the exit location for better performance.
trans-unit.target: Når dette er valgt, velger appen automatisk en tilfeldig server, og den prioriterer de nærmest utgangsplasseringen for å oppnå bedre ytelse.
trans-unit.note: Description of the automatic location in the multihop mode “Always”.

trans-unit.id: When the “Automatic” location is selected, the app automatically picks a random entry server, prioritizing those closer to the exit location for better performance
trans-unit.source: When the “Automatic” location is selected, the app automatically picks a random entry server, prioritizing those closer to the exit location for better performance
trans-unit.target: Når plassering velges «Automatisk», velger appen automatisk en tilfeldig inngangsserver, og den prioriterer de nærmest utgangsplasseringen for å oppnå bedre ytelse
trans-unit.note: Description of a feature in the Automatic location section of the app.

trans-unit.id: When this feature is enabled it stops the device from contacting certain domains or websites known for distributing ads, malware, trackers and more.
trans-unit.source: When this feature is enabled it stops the device from contacting certain domains or websites known for distributing ads, malware, trackers and more.
trans-unit.target: Når denne funksjonen er aktivert, forhindrer den enheten fra å kontakte bestemte domener og nettsteder som er kjent for å spre annonser, skadelig programvare, sporingsenheter og mer.

trans-unit.id: Which TCP port the UDP-over-TCP obfuscation protocol should connect to on the VPN server.
trans-unit.source: Which TCP port the UDP-over-TCP obfuscation protocol should connect to on the VPN server.
trans-unit.target: TCP-porten som UDP-over-TCP-tilsløringen skal koble til på VPN-serveren.

trans-unit.id: With the “Direct” method, the app communicates with a Mullvad API server directly without any intermediate proxies.
trans-unit.source: With the “Direct” method, the app communicates with a Mullvad API server directly without any intermediate proxies.
trans-unit.target: Med «Direkte»-metoden kan appen kommunisere direkte med en Mullvad API-server uten proxyer mellom.

trans-unit.id: With the “Encrypted DNS proxy” method, the app will communicate with our Mullvad API through a proxy address. It does this by retrieving an address from a DNS over HTTPS (DoH) server and then using that to reach our API servers.
trans-unit.source: With the “Encrypted DNS proxy” method, the app will communicate with our Mullvad API through a proxy address. It does this by retrieving an address from a DNS over HTTPS (DoH) server and then using that to reach our API servers.
trans-unit.target: Med metoden «Kryptert DNS-proxy» vil appen kommunisere med Mullvad API gjennom en proxy-adresse. Dette gjøres ved å hente en adresse fra en DNS over HTTPS-server (DoH) og deretter bruke den til å nå API-serverne våre.

trans-unit.id: With the “Mullvad bridges” method, the app communicates with a Mullvad API server via a Mullvad bridge server. It does this by sending the traffic obfuscated by Shadowsocks.
trans-unit.source: With the “Mullvad bridges” method, the app communicates with a Mullvad API server via a Mullvad bridge server. It does this by sending the traffic obfuscated by Shadowsocks.
trans-unit.target: Med «Mullvad-broer»-metoden kan appen kommunisere med en Mullvad API-server via en Mullvad-broserver. Den gjør det ved å sende trafikken i tilslørt tilstand ved å bruke Shadowsocks.

trans-unit.id: Would you like to continue to %@ “%@”?
trans-unit.source: Would you like to continue to %1$@ “%2$@”?
trans-unit.note: The message in an alert that asks the user whether they want to continue with enabling or disabling a feature. The first argument is a verb ("enable" or "disable"). The second argument is the name of the feature.
Question asked when a user is prompted to continue an action that requires restarting the VPN connection.

trans-unit.id: You already have a saved account number, by creating a new account the saved account number will be removed from this device. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.source: You already have a saved account number, by creating a new account the saved account number will be removed from this device. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: Du har allerede et lagret kontonummer. Når du oppretter en ny konto, blir det lagrede kontonummeret fjernet fra denne enheten. Dette kan ikke angres.

trans-unit.id: You are about to send the problem report without a way for us to get back to you. If you want an answer to your report you will have to enter an email address.
trans-unit.source: You are about to send the problem report without a way for us to get back to you. If you want an answer to your report you will have to enter an email address.
trans-unit.target: Problemrapporten blir nå sendt uten en måte for oss å kontakte deg på. Hvis du ønsker svar på rapporten, må du oppgi en e-postadresse.

trans-unit.id: You are logged in with an invalid account number. Please log out and try another one.
trans-unit.source: You are logged in with an invalid account number. Please log out and try another one.
trans-unit.target: Du er logget inn med et ugyldig kontonummer. Logg ut og prøv et annet.

trans-unit.id: You can add more time via the account view or website to continue using the VPN.
trans-unit.source: You can add more time via the account view or website to continue using the VPN.
trans-unit.target: Du kan legge til mer tid via kontooversikten eller nettstedet for å fortsette å bruke VPN.

trans-unit.id: You can buy time in the app, or you can go to our website where you can also redeem vouchers.
trans-unit.source: You can buy time in the app, or you can go to our website where you can also redeem vouchers.
trans-unit.target: Du kan kjøpe tid i appen, eller du kan gå til nettstedet vårt, der du også kan innløse kuponger.
trans-unit.note: Description of how users can purchase time for their Mullvad VPN account.

trans-unit.id: You can have up to 5 devices logged in on one Mullvad account.
trans-unit.source: You can have up to 5 devices logged in on one Mullvad account.
trans-unit.target: Du kan ha opptil fem enheter logget inn på samme Mullvad-konto.

trans-unit.id: You can now continue logging in on this device.
trans-unit.source: You can now continue logging in on this device.
trans-unit.target: Du kan nå fortsette med å logge på denne enheten.

trans-unit.id: You can use the "restore purchases" function to check for any in-app payments made via Apple services. If there is a payment that has not been credited, it will add the time to the currently logged in Mullvad account.
trans-unit.source: You can use the "restore purchases" function to check for any in-app payments made via Apple services. If there is a payment that has not been credited, it will add the time to the currently logged in Mullvad account.
trans-unit.target: Du kan bruke funksjonen «Gjenopprett kjøp» for å sjekke om det er gjort noen betalinger i appen via Apple-tjenester. Hvis det er en betaling som ikke er kreditert, vil den legge til tiden til den Mullvad-kontoen som for øyeblikket er logget inn.

trans-unit.id: You currently have entry filters applied. Selecting the “Automatic” location, the app will ignore filter settings for the entry server.
trans-unit.source: You currently have entry filters applied. Selecting the “Automatic” location, the app will ignore filter settings for the entry server.
trans-unit.target: You currently have entry filters applied. Selecting the “Automatic” location, the app will ignore filter settings for the entry server.
trans-unit.note: Warning message in an alert that appears when a user selects the "Automatic" location in the multihop flow, given that they have entry filters applied.

trans-unit.id: You currently have entry filters applied. Switching to “%@“, the app will ignore filter settings for the entry server that is being automatically selected.
trans-unit.source: You currently have entry filters applied. Switching to “%@“, the app will ignore filter settings for the entry server that is being automatically selected.
trans-unit.target: Du har for øyeblikket aktive inngangsfiltre. Hvis du bytter til «%@», vil appen se bort fra filterinnstillingene til inngangsserveren som velges automatisk.
trans-unit.note: Variable refers to multihop mode

trans-unit.id: You currently have notifications disabled. This means that we cannot send you a notification when an update is available so that you can disable this feature or disconnect before updating.
trans-unit.source: You currently have notifications disabled. This means that we cannot send you a notification when an update is available so that you can disable this feature or disconnect before updating.
trans-unit.target: Du har for øyeblikket deaktivert varsler. Dette betyr at vi ikke kan sende deg et varsel når en oppdatering er tilgjengelig, slik at du kan deaktivere denne funksjonen eller koble fra før oppdatering.
trans-unit.note: First paragraph of an alert that appears when the user is prompted to reconsider enabling notifications.

trans-unit.id: You have %@ left on this account.
trans-unit.source: You have %@ left on this account.

trans-unit.id:
You have a right to privacy. That’s why we never store activity logs, don’t ask for personal information, and encourage anonymous payments.
In some situations, as outlined in our privacy policy, we might process personal data that you choose to send, for example if you email us.
We strongly believe in retaining as little data as possible because we want you to remain anonymous.
trans-unit.source:
You have a right to privacy. That’s why we never store activity logs, don’t ask for personal information, and encourage anonymous payments.
In some situations, as outlined in our privacy policy, we might process personal data that you choose to send, for example if you email us.
We strongly believe in retaining as little data as possible because we want you to remain anonymous.
trans-unit.target:
Du har rett til personvern. Derfor lagrer vi aldri aktivitetslogger, ber ikke om personlig informasjon og oppfordrer til anonyme betalinger.
I enkelte situasjoner, som beskrevet i vår personvernpolicy, kan vi behandle personopplysninger som du velger å sende oss, for eksempel hvis du sender oss en e-post.
Vi er overbevist om at det er viktig å lagre så lite data som mulig, fordi vi ønsker at du skal forbli anonym.

trans-unit.id: You have no more VPN time left on this account.
trans-unit.source: You have no more VPN time left on this account.
trans-unit.target: Du har ikke mer VPN-tid igjen på kontoen.

trans-unit.id: You have one day left on this account. Please add more time to continue using the VPN.
trans-unit.source: You have one day left on this account. Please add more time to continue using the VPN.
trans-unit.target: Du har én dag igjen på denne kontoen. Legg til mer tid for å fortsette å bruke VPN.

trans-unit.id: You have removed this device. To connect again, you will need to log back in.
trans-unit.source: You have removed this device. To connect again, you will need to log back in.
trans-unit.target: Du har fjernet denne enheten. For å koble til igjen, må du logge inn på nytt.
Du har endringer som ikke er lagret.

trans-unit.id: Your current filters were applied to both entry and exit locations.
trans-unit.source: Your current filters were applied to both entry and exit locations.
trans-unit.target: De nåværende filtrene ble brukt på både inn- og utgangsplasseringene.
trans-unit.note: Text displayed in a notification when a user's settings have been updated, explaining that the change affected both entry and exit locations.

trans-unit.id: Your device is offline. The tunnel will automatically connect once your device is back online.
trans-unit.source: Your device is offline. The tunnel will automatically connect once your device is back online.
trans-unit.target: Enheten er frakoblet. Tunnelen vil koble til automatisk når enheten er tilkoblet internett igjen.

trans-unit.id: Your device is offline. Try connecting again when the device has access to Internet.
trans-unit.source: Your device is offline. Try connecting again when the device has access to Internet.
trans-unit.target: Enheten din er frakoblet. Forsøk å koble til igjen når enheten har tilgang til internett.

trans-unit.id: Your multihop setting was migrated from “%@” to “%@”.
trans-unit.source: Your multihop setting was migrated from “%1$@” to “%2$@”.
trans-unit.target: Innstillingen for multihopp ble overført fra «%1$@» til «%2$@».
trans-unit.note: A text describing a migration from one multihop setting to another. The first argument is the string “%arg”. The second argument is the string “%arg”.

trans-unit.id: Your previous purchases have already been added to this account.
trans-unit.source: Your previous purchases have already been added to this account.
trans-unit.target: Dine tidligere kjøp er allerede lagt til denne kontoen.

trans-unit.id: Your previous purchases have been added to your account.
trans-unit.source: Your previous purchases have been added to your account.
trans-unit.target: Dine tidligere kjøp er lagt til kontoen din.

trans-unit.note: Action that will be performed when showing the disconnect warning alert.
Multihop mode
The first argument is a verb ("enable" or "disable"). The argument is the name of the feature.
The action to perform when continuing.
Text that appears in a warning banner when a user's connection will be blocked due to a change in their settings.

trans-unit.id: iOS features known to be affected:
trans-unit.source: iOS features known to be affected:
trans-unit.target: iOS-funksjoner som man vet er berørt:
trans-unit.note: Heading for a section in the "Known issues" view that lists iOS features known to be affected.
Feature name for the language setting.
Obfuscation method

trans-unit.id: “%@“ is enabled, please disable it before updating or you will lose network connectivity. This will briefly expose your traffic as you reconnect to the VPN.
trans-unit.source: “%@“ is enabled, please disable it before updating or you will lose network connectivity. This will briefly expose your traffic as you reconnect to the VPN.
trans-unit.target: «%@» er aktivert. Deaktiver den før du oppdaterer, ellers vil du miste nettverksforbindelsen. Dette vil eksponere trafikken din i en kort periode når du kobler til VPN-et på nytt.
trans-unit.note: A message in an in-app notification alert that explains the purpose of the alert and gives an option to disable a feature that might cause a user to lose network connectivity when an app update is available. The first argument The argument is the string “Force all apps”.

trans-unit.id: “%@” is enabled, please disable it or disconnect before updating or you will lose network connectivity.
trans-unit.source: “%@” is enabled, please disable it or disconnect before updating or you will lose network connectivity.
trans-unit.target: «%@» er aktivert. Deaktiver eller koble fra før du du oppdaterer, ellers vil du miste nettverksforbindelsen.
trans-unit.note: A warning banner at the top of the screen that appears when the user has enabled "Force all apps" in Settings. The argument is the string “Force all apps”.
Description of a settings update when the "Direct only" option is removed from the multihop settings.

trans-unit.source: The app needs this to connect and test a new method.
trans-unit.target: Appen trenger dette for å koble til og teste en ny metode.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Local Network Usage Description

trans-unit.id: Disable “%@” or disconnect before updating in order not to lose network connectivity.
trans-unit.source: Disable “%@” or disconnect before updating in order not to lose network connectivity.
trans-unit.target: Deaktiver «%@» eller koble fra før du oppdaterer for å sikre at du ikke mister nettverksforbindelsen.
